utility_evaluation.REASONING:

Step 2: Compare with the final coverage plan. The final plan includes all 5 items.

- property_coverage: includes plan name, detailed coverage description (home contents, additional gear coverage), and cost. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: includes plan name, detailed coverage description (travel insurance, regions, activities covered), and cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: includes plan name, description of the service, and cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: includes complete monthly and annual breakdown. Fully specified.
Step 4: All 5 items are present and contain all required details.
